headline: JP Morgan Maintains Neutral on Hershey, Lowers Price Target to $191
summary: JP Morgan  analyst Thomas Palmer   maintains Hershey (NYSE:HSY) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $204 to $191.

headline: Hershey: A Cautious 'Buy' As Margins Begin To Recover (Upgrade)
summary: Hershey stock looks attractive after underperformance, given its 3.3% yield, margin recovery, and growth catalysts. Click here to learn more about HSY.
